articles.title: BANK OF ENGLAND CONFIRMS PLANS FOR STABLECOIN HOLDING LIMITS
articles.summary: The Bank of England confirmed plans to introduce "temporary" stablecoin holding limits of £20,000 per coin for individuals and £10 million for businesses, with exemptions for exchanges and large merchants, inviting industry criticism that the rules exceed US and EU restrictions. Deputy Governor Sarah Breeden defended the caps as necessary to protect the commercial banking sector that underpins mortgages, while the BOE proposed issuers back stablecoins with 60% short-term UK government debt and 40% Bank of England accounts. The framework applies only to sterling-denominated systemic stablecoins used for retail payments and wholesale settlement. Consultation will run until February before final rules are published later next year.

articles.title: SENATE AG RELEASES DRAFT OF CRYPTO MARKET STRUCTURE LEGISLATION
articles.summary: The Senate Agriculture Committee released a draft crypto market structure bill that defines CFTC oversight of spot markets, though bracketed sections show lawmakers haven't finalized key provisions, including DeFi developer protections and CFTC commissioner requirements. The legislation must be combined with the Senate Banking Committee's version before advancing, a process complicated by internal Republican disagreements and Senator Elizabeth Warren's objections over industry risks and Trump's crypto stake. The bill directs CFTC and SEC to jointly develop rules on portfolio margining and intermediary oversight while defining blockchain-related terms under the Commodity Exchange Act. Senate floor passage may slip to Q1 2026 despite Trump's original August deadline as committees work through amendments and stakeholder negotiations.

articles.title: COINBASE LAUNCHES PLATFORM FOR DIGITAL TOKEN OFFERINGS
articles.summary: Coinbase launched a token sales platform that offers retail investors access to digital assets before exchange listing, marking the first US public token offerings since the 2018 ICO crash that led to regulatory crackdowns and billions in losses. The platform will host monthly sales with algorithmic allocation during one-week windows, featuring anti-dumping mechanisms including reduced allocations for immediate sellers and six-month lockups for issuers and affiliates. Monad will debut next week as the first project. Coinbase has committed to list all tokens sold through the platform as part of its strategy to diversify beyond trading fees and build an "everything exchange" for blockchain-based financial services.

articles.title: SQUARE BITCOIN PAYMENTS GO LIVE
articles.summary: Square activated Bitcoin payments for 4 million US merchants with zero processing fees through 2027, enabling Lightning Network transactions that convert instantly to USD or remain in BTC at merchant discretion. The platform allows businesses to automatically convert up to 50% of daily sales into Bitcoin for treasury holdings. Internal surveys show 29% of businesses exploring conversions and 89% of interested merchants planning long-term BTC accumulation.

articles.title: DEBUNKING AERODROME FUD: EMISSIONS ≠ INFLATION
articles.summary: Token emissions don't automatically cause hyperinflation. Nearly half of all AERO is locked, removing it from circulation and keeping real inflation around 5.6%, comparable to gold. Emissions aren't cash burn, they're equity distribution. Aerodrome generates $185M annualized revenue with zero dollar outflow while veAERO holders earn all protocol income plus rebases. With 49% of supply locked, 60% Base DEX market share, and partners like Coinbase and Circle, Aerodrome is following the blitzscaling playbook used by Amazon and Google to dominate markets.

articles.title: UNISWAP TOKEN INCREASE AFTER FEE SWITCH PROPOSAL
articles.summary: Uniswap's UNI token increased 41.5% in 24 hours and 83% over the week following the "UNIfication" proposal that activates protocol fees to fund a perpetual token burn, including a one-time retroactive burn of roughly 100 million tokens from the treasury. The DEX generates $650 million in daily volume and over $2 billion in annualized fees, but has lacked a mechanism to return value to token holders until now. The overhaul introduces MEV discount auctions, eliminates front-end interface fees, and deploys v4 "aggregator hooks" to turn Uniswap into an onchain aggregator that collects fees on external liquidity while deepening its competitive moat against centralized exchanges.

articles.title: COINBASE ICO PLATFORM SIGNALS A NEW ERA FOR US CRYPTO REGULATION
articles.summary: Coinbase's upcoming ICO platform is the clearest signal yet that the CLARITY Act, legislation redefining token launches as legal capital formation tools, is on track to pass. What was once considered a criminal offense in the US is transforming into a regulated framework for startups to raise capital, distribute ownership, and return profits through buybacks or dividends. This shift could mark a turning point for the global crypto industry, enabling open, compliant tokenized capital markets accessible to builders and investors worldwide.

articles.title: USDC FACES REGULATORY SPLIT BETWEEN US AND EU FRAMEWORKS
articles.summary: Circle has just 12 months to address a fundamental regulatory conflict. USDC cannot comply with both the EU's MiCA framework and the US GENIUS Act under a single token structure. MiCA mandates 30% of reserves be held in EU banks, while GENIUS requires 100% backing in US Treasuries, making dual compliance impossible. This could force Circle to issue two separate tokens (USDC-US and USDC-EU), splitting $35B in liquidity. This would fragment DeFi liquidity pools, regional redemption limits, and likely cause price divergence between the two versions, marking a major challenge for stablecoin interoperability across regulatory borders.

articles.title: VLAD TENEV ON TOKENIZATION OF EQUITIES
articles.summary: Robinhood is still in Phase 1 - Phase 2 and 3 will enable secondary trading and DeFi integrations.

articles.title: UNISWAP FEE SWITCH STRENGTHENS AERODROME'S ADVANTAGE
articles.summary: Uniswap's decision to activate its fee switch could backfire, making it bearish for Uniswap, but bullish for Aerodrome, which already dominates Base with roughly 2:1 trading volume.

articles.title: THE RACE TO POWER STABLECOIN PAYMENTS IN THE AI ECONOMY
articles.summary: As fintechs quietly integrate stablecoins behind the scenes, the real opportunity lies in becoming the default payment connector for AI systems like ChatGPT.

articles.title: ETHEREUM EXPANDS DECENTRALIZATION AS SOLANA AND BITCOIN CENTRALIZE
articles.summary: Ethereum, already the most decentralized network, is set to become even more accessible and censorship-resistant.
